steps.t: Léofmar is in Fangorn. You should speak with Léofmar.
You should <rgb=#FF0000>whistle</rgb> for Léofmar's horse. You must be standing near Léofmar in order to do this. <rgb=#FF0000>You m…
Léofmar is in Fangorn. You should talk to Léofmar once more.
You should search for other sleeping Ents in the forest, heading north-east from Léofmar's location.
